name: Aurora Strip 4

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: F50C8AE6-E37B-11EA-ABC8-525400685065

comment: Aurora 4 s a high output theatrical strip luminaire that provides rich color mixing for multiple applications around the performance stage, including set piece illimitation, graze / cyc lighting, foot lighting, and more. The Strand Aurora LED is available in a 4-cell and 12-cell version and is suitable for theatres, houses of worship, and TV and film studios. The RGBALC (Red, Green, Blue, Amber, Lime & Cyan) color mixing system on the Aurora LED offers a wide mixable color spectrum, but it can be easily controlled with traditional CYM controls using the SmartColor Control system.

capabilities.comment: Strobe Random S > F - Strobe Random
